description: A newly admitted student wants to apply for on-campus housing for their first year.

nodes.task_description: Verify the student's admission status and eligibility for housing.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the student has been admitted and is eligible.

nodes.task_description: Guide the student to the online housing application portal.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides the correct URL and explains the application steps.

nodes.task_description: Explain the different housing options (e.g., dorm styles, meal plans) and the lottery process.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the housing options and how assignments are made.
